what_it_does: Community and official best practices for Claude Code: superpowers plugins, GSD workflows, skill systems, hook-driven automation, agent SDK patterns.
operational_patterns: Superpowers skill system — skill invocation before action
GSD workflow — milestone → phase → plan → execute → verify
Plugin architecture for extending Claude Code
runtime_patterns: Git worktree isolation for parallel agents
Subagent delegation with typed agent roles
Model selection: Opus for strategy, Sonnet for execution
OpusPlan mode — Opus plans, Sonnet executes
governance_patterns: Permission mode system (auto, default, plan, bypassPermissions)
redundancy_risk: MEDIUM — UMH uses many of these patterns (skills, worktrees, hooks, plan mode). The GSD workflow and superpowers plugins are external extensions, not core CC.
adaptation_priority: LOW — UMH already has its own skill system, verification loops, and agent delegation. The external plugin ecosystem adds convenience, not capability.
expected_leverage_gain: 0.05 — minor UX improvements possible from plugin ecosystem study
